   Has Settable Display Name: true
   Size: 204800
   Device Type: Direct-Access
   Multipath Plugin: NMP
   Devfs Path: /vmfs/devices/disks/t10.NVMe____VBOX_HARDDISK___________________________VBa1b2c3d4
   Vendor: NVMe
   Model: VBOX HARDDISK
   Revision: 1.0
   SCSI Level: 5
   Is Pseudo: false
   Status: on
   Is RDM Capable: false
   Is Local: true
   Is Removable: false
   Is SSD: false
   Is VVOL PE: false
   Is Offline: false
   Is Perennially Reserved: false
   Queue Full Sample Size: 0
   Queue Full Threshold: 0
   Thin Provisioning Status: unknown
   Attached Filters:
   VAAI Status: unknown
   Other UIDs: vml.0100000000564261316232633364340000000000000000
   Is Shared Clusterwide: false
   Is SAS: false
   Is USB: false
   Is Boot Device: false
   Device Max Queue Depth: 256

   Drive Type: unknown
   RAID Level: unknown
   Number of Physical Drives Backing the Virtual Disk: 0
   Protection Enabled: false
   PI Activated: false
   PI Type: 0
   PI Protection Mask: NO PROTECTION
   Supported Guard Types: NO GUARD SUPPORT

mpx.vmhba0:C0:T0:L0
   Display Name: Local VMware Disk (mpx.vmhba0:C0:T0:L0)
   Has Settable Display Name: true
   Size: 8192
   Device Type: Direct-Access
   Multipath Plugin: NMP
   Devfs Path: /vmfs/devices/disks/mpx.vmhba0:C0:T0:L0

   Model: Virtual disk
   Revision: 2.0
